name: components/segmented-control
description: A set of mutually exclusive buttons visually grouped as a single control, resembling native iOS or macOS segmented controls. Provides a complete composition system with SegmentedControl, SegmentedControlItemInput, SegmentedControlItemLabel, and SegmentedControlItem. Supports single selection only, keyboard arrow navigation, and accessible radio-input semantics under the hood. Built on Kobalte SegmentedControl with full ARIA radiogroup support.
useCases: View-mode toggles (List, Grid, Map) in search-result or gallery interfaces
Time-range selectors (Day, Week, Month, Year) in calendar and analytics apps
Chart-type switchers (Line, Bar, Pie, Area) inside data-visualization toolbars
Filter scope controls (All, Active, Archived) in compact table or list headers
